name: Unbelievable Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 pints cool whip or whipped cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned fruit.
2. Grate the chocolate bars and set aside.
3. Combine the whipped cream with the sour cream.
4. Fold in the fruit and chocolate, then serve immediately.
Note: All fruit except blueberries (if frozen) can be combined and chilled overnight. Assemble just prior to serving. Makes 6-8 generous servings. This can also be served as a light dessert.
